candidates.latest_validation: Implemented as aligned forecast-source temperature range. Synthetic profiler smoke confirms multi-source forecasts aggregate to forecast_model_count and model_disagreement. Needs real multi-model forecast history before alpha promotion.

candidates.latest_validation: Implemented as traded bucket midpoint distance from the city-level forecast median/normal in the aligned sample. This is an offline research proxy until a climatology source is added.

candidates.reason: 2026-05-19 research found many sub-0.20 buy entries in narrow temperature buckets; test whether low-price bucket buys are positive expectancy
candidates.promotion_blocker: needs settlement-grade official source validation before alpha approval
candidates.latest_validation: Implemented and rerun on data/profiler_beefslayer. Coverage: 3020 rows, mean flag rate 31.79%. Walk-forward behavior validation rejected it: oos_lift=0.0000, negative_lift=0.0966, stability=1.0000, replication=0.0000. Earlier Open-Meteo/grid substitute outcome check showed price < 0.20 bucket proxy ROI +15.38%, but that is not settlement-grade and does not override the behavior-validation rejection.

candidates.reason: 1F bucket outcomes can flip when generic weather grids differ from the exact Polymarket settlement station/source
candidates.latest_validation: Official Weather.com historical observation adapter implemented. Small sample from data/profiler_beefslayer: 25 station/date rows fetched, 22 ok and 3 non-US RKSI HTTP errors. Joined factor table has 118 official_high_temp_f rows. Using official station settlement on 109 bucket-bounded rows gives +$225.12 PnL, 11.78% ROI, 81.13% win rate. However, official_station_basis as a standalone walk-forward behavior factor is rejected: oos_lift=0.0169, stability=0.0000. Conclusion: official station data is essential for correct settlement/PnL, but basis alone is not yet a confirmed entry trigger.

candidates.reason: fills cluster around 18Z-22Z, suggesting same-day temperature path monitoring rather than pure daily forecast selection
candidates.promotion_blocker: needs intraday official station observations to validate alpha, not just timing behavior
candidates.latest_validation: Implemented and rerun on data/profiler_beefslayer. Coverage: 3020 rows, mean flag rate 53.61%. Walk-forward behavior validation rejected it: oos_lift=0.0000, negative_lift=0.0178, stability=1.0000, replication=0.0000. Timing concentration exists, but this factor alone does not explain buy behavior or alpha.

candidates.reason: 2026-05-19 research found weak concentration immediately after 00Z/06Z/12Z/18Z; keep as a diagnostic to confirm or reject model-release sniping
candidates.promotion_blocker: diagnostic factor; needs model-run issue/availability timestamps for precise release-latency validation
candidates.latest_validation: Implemented and rerun on data/profiler_beefslayer. Coverage: 3020 rows; min=27s, max=21599s, mean=11058.09s. Walk-forward behavior validation is researching: oos_lift=0.0151, negative_lift=0.0000, stability=0.6511, replication=0.0000. It does not support a simple immediate model-release-sniping thesis, but remains useful as a diagnostic timing factor.

candidates.reason: wallet concentrates across repeat cities; test whether edge is city-specific forecast bias against official station highs
candidates.latest_proxy_validation: Implemented as realized-minus-forecast bias and city-level mean absolute bias. It remains offline-only because realized temperatures are ex-post labels; use it to discover persistent city/model error, not as a live entry signal.

candidates.reason: same city-day markets form adjacent temperature ladders; edge may come from incoherent probability mass across buckets
candidates.latest_validation: CLOB prices-history endpoint tested for sibling bucket prices at wallet fill time. Small sample: 3 events, 47 fills, 33 token history calls. Official-settlement PnL on this sample: +$24.05, 5.8% ROI, 95.7% win rate. A simple ladder direction alignment split did not prove standalone edge: aligned n=14 ROI 7.93%, not_aligned n=33 ROI 5.32%. Conclusion: historical sibling prices are obtainable, but simple ladder mispricing is not yet confirmed; next version must combine ladder state with official-station nowcast/target-bucket exclusion.

candidates.reason: combined entry factor suggested by validation: use official station nowcast/high-to-date, target bucket distance/exclusion, and sibling ladder prices at fill time to explain Yes/No entries
candidates.latest_validation: Implemented as a non-leaking proxy that requires official_high_to_date_f observed before each fill. It combines station high-to-date bucket proximity, entry price, and ladder mispricing. Final official_high_temp_f is deliberately excluded from this entry factor to avoid settlement leakage.
